notes: Redacted extracted text layer of a Commerce Control merchant statement. Merchant-identifying information and account/batch numbers are replaced with placeholders; fee-row descriptions, amounts, page numbers, and line ordering are preserved for deterministic extraction, classification, metrics, and reconciliation regression coverage.
